title: T1 — DAVID RunPod train config + dry-run scaffold (14B / 2,351 pairs)

did: Created runpod_train_config.json — 14B base (DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B), 2,351 Alpaca JSONL pairs
Hyperparams sized for L40S 48GB: rank 32, alpha 16, batch 2 × grad_accum 8, lr 1e-4, 5 epochs (~730 steps)
Adapter output template models/adapters/david-7b_{timestamp}_{tag} — fleet prefix retained
Created train_david.sh — dry-run default; --live gated by ALLOW_GPU_TRAIN=1; --install RunPod deps
Extended david_finetune_pipeline.py with --config path: --check, --stub, --run from runpod_train_config.json
recap.state: DRAFT — stub pipeline GREEN; live GPU blocked until Benjamin authorizes ALLOW_GPU_TRAIN=1 on RunPod L40S
next: Benjamin inspect stub output + 14B hyperparams before RunPod spend
Run 4 fine-tune on L40S with regenerated 2,351-pair dataset
Download adapter via RunPod file manager — do not kill pod before download

RECAP
